release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 70. Removes the alarm-response blocking caused by synchronous WhatsApp delivery. Adds a dedicated FreeRTOS cloud-alert task with queued caregiver notifications and non-blocking TextMeBot recipient spacing. Adds a separate high-priority alarm-audio task so buzzer timing continues accurately during HTTPS and Nightscout activity. The Web UI, buttons and display remain responsive while alerts are delivered. Adds immediate acknowledge-and-snooze handling, alarm episode tracking, provider queue diagnostics, cloud-send timing, queue-depth monitoring and alarm-specific sound and pause behaviour. Retains the fixed setup hotspot SSID 'leah 2R - 2.42I', password 'leah00000000', Today and Yesterday treatment tables, Nightscout SAGE, IOB and COB support, Wi-Fi profiles, local alias and caregiver routing.
